description_long: This is a compact, single-story urban house with a modern, minimalist design. The structure features a flat roof and a small, gated front yard that includes a covered carport with a parked vehicle. The exterior walls are primarily white with some gray accents, and the windows are rectangular with simple frames, arranged asymmetrically. The house includes a main entry door at the front, adjacent to the carport, and a small porch area protected by a metal railing. The interior layout is visible, showing a kitchen, living area, and at least one bedroom and bathroom, all finished with light-colored materials. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story urban house with a flat roof, gated carport, and minimalist white and gray exterior. Features include a small porch, asymmetrical windows, and a visible interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated carport with a vehicle, main entry door, porch area, and partial interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, porch railing, and a clear look into the kitchen and living area through the open side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back walls, windows, and interior rooms, with less emphasis on the entryway or carport.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain exterior wall, rear doors, and windows, with the porch and carport visible at the far end.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door adjacent to a covered carport, with a small porch and metal railing, no decorative columns or overhangs.
